paragraphs.para: Soumet aux Ministères de l'instruction publique des différents pays la recommandation suivante :
paragraphs.think: Tags 'SYST_OTHER' (Education system monitoring & evaluation) and 'POL_OTH' (Policy theme) are selected because the paragraph involves submitting recommendations to education ministries, which relates to policy frameworks and systemic evaluation. Para 55 (education orientation guides) is complemental as it addresses student/profession guidance, aligning with the recommendation's purpose. Para 28 (organizational participation in policy) is supporting as it reinforces the need for stakeholder involvement in educational policy.
paragraphs.para_en: Submits to the Ministries of Public Education of the various countries the following recommendation:

paragraphs.para: 1. L'ampleur de la pénurie de cadres techniques et scientifiques exige en général l'adoption de mesures spéciales d'urgence destinées à activer le recrutement et la formation de ces cadres; pour rendre ces mesures plus efficaces, il convient que les plans et les programmes correspondants reposent sur une étude périodique, aussi complète et approfondie que possible, des besoins actuels et futurs en cadres des divers niveaux (chercheurs, ingénieurs, techniciens et ouvriers qualifiés) sans préjudice d'aucun d'entre eux.
paragraphs.think: Tags F_VET (Vocational and technical skills) and ISC_99 (Multiple levels) are selected because the paragraph focuses on technical/scientific personnel across various levels (researchers, engineers, etc.). Related paragraphs: 20 (expands on the study methodology), 19 (supports with institutional mechanisms), 33 (complements with funding measures), 47 (links to instructor recruitment challenges), and 57 (adds context about general education integration).
paragraphs.para_en: 1. The scale of the shortage of technical and scientific personnel generally requires the adoption of special emergency measures aimed at accelerating the recruitment and training of such personnel; to enhance the effectiveness of these measures, the corresponding plans and programs should be based on a periodic study, as comprehensive and thorough as possible, of current and future needs for personnel at various levels (researchers, engineers, technicians, and skilled workers), without prejudice to any of them.

paragraphs.para: 2. Etant donné la complexité d'un inventaire des besoins actuels et futurs en matière de cadres techniques et scientifiques, toutes facilités devraient être accordées aux spécialistes chargés de cette tâche ; il serait hautement souhaitable que l'organisme responsable ait un caractère permanent, qu'il ait accès à toutes les sources d'information disponibles à l'échelon national et qu'il opère en étroite liaison avec les organes chargés d'établir les plans économiques, là où il s'en trouve.
paragraphs.think: Tags POL_GOV (governance/planning) and F_VET (vocational/technical skills) are selected because the paragraph discusses governance structures for technical/scientific personnel and vocational training. Related paragraphs (20, 21, 26, 28, 29, 34) address complementary aspects like study components, policy participation, coordination mechanisms, and financial coordination, all directly tied to the target paragraph's focus on inventorying needs and institutional frameworks.
paragraphs.para_en: 2. Given the complexity of an inventory of current and future needs for technical and scientific personnel, all facilities should be provided to the specialists responsible for this task; it would be highly desirable that the responsible body be permanent in nature, have access to all information sources available at the national level, and operate in close coordination with the bodies responsible for establishing economic plans, where such bodies exist.

paragraphs.para: 3. Une étude des besoins actuels et futurs en matière de cadres techniques et scientifiques devrait comprendre, entre autres: a) un inventaire des cadres en exercice, du déficit existant à l'heure actuelle et des prévisions pour l'avenir; b) un inventaire des diplômes décernés dans les différentes disciplines au cours de l'année précédente, ainsi qu'un inventaire des cadres en cours de formation (nombre des élèves de l'enseignement du second degré et de l'enseignement supérieur qui se préparent à devenir des cadres techniques et scientifiques); c) un inventaire des moyens de formation (possibilités actuelles, avec le nombre d'établissements et de places disponibles, le nombre de professeurs, etc.; prévisions en ce qui concerne les exigences futures; équipement actuel et futur); d) une estimation des crédits affectés actuellement à la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques et des crédits complémentaires indispensables pour faire face aux besoins actuels et futurs, tels qu'ils résultent des inventaires ci-dessus; e) une analyse des possibilités de financement de ces besoins, compte tenu du développement probable du revenu national et de l'aide que pourraient octroyer les organisations régionales ou internationales.
paragraphs.think: Tags F_VET (vocational/technical skills) apply due to focus on technical/scientific personnel training. INFRA_OTHER (infrastructure/resources) relates to training resources and equipment. T_INI (initial education) connects to inventory of students in secondary/higher education. Related paragraphs provide complemental information on study applications, funding, institutional expansion, and resource requirements.
paragraphs.para_en: 3. A study of current and future needs for technical and scientific personnel should include, among other things: a) an inventory of the personnel currently in service, the existing deficit at present, and forecasts for the future; b) an inventory of degrees awarded in various disciplines during the previous year, as well as an inventory of personnel undergoing training (the number of students in secondary and higher education preparing to become technical and scientific personnel); c) an inventory of training resources (current capacities, including the number of institutions and available places, the number of instructors, etc.; forecasts regarding future requirements; current and future equipment); d) an estimate of the funds currently allocated to the training of technical and scientific personnel and the additional funding essential to meet current and future needs, as derived from the inventories mentioned above; e) an analysis of the possibilities for financing these needs, taking into account the probable development of national income and aid that regional or international organizations might provide.

paragraphs.para: 4. Les conclusions de l'étude des besoins actuels et futurs en matière de cadres techniques et scientifiques seront utilisées pour informer l'opinion au sujet de toute initiative majeure en ce domaine, afin de lui faire comprendre la nécessité de l'effort financier et des réformes et changements d'habitudes que doivent entraîner l'application des plans éventuels de formation et l'adaptation continuelle des structures de l'enseignement technique et scientifique aux exigences du développement général du pays; ces mêmes conclusions serviront également à renseigner la jeunesse sur les secteurs de 'l'économie où la demande est la plus forte.
paragraphs.think: Tags CUR_EVAL (Curriculum evaluation and reform) apply because the paragraph discusses using study conclusions to inform reforms and changes in education structures. POP_YOUTH (Youth and adolescents) applies due to the explicit mention of informing young people about economic sectors. Related paragraphs: 22 (complemental - flexible training plans align with adaptation needs), 23 (supporting - national representation supports public opinion engagement), 25 (complemental - flexible structures for technical education), 30 (supporting - financial effort for training), 31 (supporting - necessity of training in disadvantaged countries), 57 (complemental - general education's role in technical training).
paragraphs.para_en: 4. The conclusions of the study on current and future needs for technical and scientific personnel will be used to inform public opinion about any major initiatives in this field, in order to make clear the necessity of financial effort as well as the reforms and changes in habits that must result from the implementation of potential training plans and the continual adaptation of the structures of technical and scientific education to the requirements of the country’s overall development; these same conclusions will also serve to inform young people about the sectors of the economy where demand is strongest.

paragraphs.para: 5. Le nombre d'années sur lesquelles doivent porter les plans de formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques variera selon les conditions 200 — particulières du pays; ces plans devront être assez souples pour que des modifications puissent leur être apportées à la lumière de l'expérience.
paragraphs.think: The paragraph discusses flexibility in training plans for technical/scientific personnel, which directly relates to 'CUR_IMPL' (Curriculum | Curriculum implementation) as it involves implementing adaptable training frameworks. Paragraph 25 complements this by emphasizing flexible school structures for technical training, while paragraph 41 addresses rational distribution of training institutions, aligning with the target's mention of country-specific conditions.
paragraphs.para_en: 5. The number of years covered by the training plans for technical and scientific personnel will vary according to the specific conditions of the country; these plans must be sufficiently flexible to allow for modifications in light of experience.

paragraphs.para: 6. Les pays responsables de l'administration d'autres pays devraient. dans leurs évaluations, tenir compte des besoins propres aux pays dont ils ont la charge; en constituant des commissions d'experts, il est souhaitable de prévoir un nombre suffisant de ressortissants du pays intéressé pour qu'ils puissent représenter le point de vue national et renseigner l'opinion locale et nationale sur l'importance et l'opportunité des réformes et des aménagements envisagés, ce qui favorisera une participation sans réserve des cadres nationaux à l'effort en faveur du développement technique.
paragraphs.think: Tags ACT_GOV (government administration), POL_INTCOOP (international collaboration), and POL_GOV (governance) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes government responsibility, cross-border cooperation, and governance structures. Related paragraphs: 24 (complemental - technical standardization), 27 (complemental - advisory bodies), 28 (supporting - policy participation), 78 (supporting - expert understanding), and 80 (complemental - international exchange).
paragraphs.para_en: 6. Countries responsible for the administration of other countries should, in their assessments, take into account the specific needs of the countries under their administration; when establishing expert commissions, it is advisable to include a sufficient number of nationals from the country concerned so that they can represent the national perspective and inform the local and national public opinion on the importance and appropriateness of the proposed reforms and adjustments, thereby fostering the wholehearted participation of national cadres in the effort towards technical development.

paragraphs.para: 7. Il serait utile d'établir une définition précise des termes, des emplois, des métiers et des professions et de les normaliser, au moins à l'échelon national; cet effort de normalisation, s'il se poursuivait à l'échelon régional ou international, faciliterait grandement les échanges de personnel avec les pays voisins et avec les autres pays dont la collaboration est recherchée.
paragraphs.think: The paragraph emphasizes standardizing professions to facilitate international personnel exchange, aligning with POL_INTCOOP (international cooperation). Related paragraphs: 26 (specialized bodies for training, complemental), 27 (advisory organs for cooperation, complemental), 75 (regional institutions for technical/scientific training, complemental), and 78 (expert secondment for training, supporting).
paragraphs.para_en: 7. It would be useful to establish a precise definition of terms, jobs, trades, and professions and to standardize them, at least at the national level; this standardization effort, if extended to the regional or international level, would greatly facilitate the exchange of personnel with neighboring countries and with other countries whose cooperation is sought.

paragraphs.para: 8. Il importe que les structures scolaires conçues pour répondre aux exigences nouvelles de la formation technique et scientifique soient assez souples pour pouvoir s'adapter à l'évolution rapide de la science et de la technique.
paragraphs.think: Tags F_SCI (science/tech focus), CUR_IMPL (curriculum adaptation), and M_FORM (formal education structures) are directly supported. Related paragraphs discuss specialized bodies (26), advisory collaboration (27), specialization balance (43), equipment needs (53), general education (57), and policy participation (28), all of which complement or modify the core idea of flexible educational frameworks.
paragraphs.para_en: It is important that school structures designed to meet the new requirements of technical and scientific training be sufficiently flexible to adapt to the rapid evolution of science and technology.

paragraphs.para: 9. Le soin de promouvoir et de coordonner les mesures destinées à activer le recrutement et la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques (plans d'action, programmes d'études, documentation, etc.) devrait être confié à des organismes spécialisés (direction générale de ministère, commission ministérielle ou interministérielle, commissariat au plan, fondation, etc.) jouissant de l'autorité et de la compétence nécessaires.
paragraphs.think: The tag 'CUR_ORG' (Curriculum | Organization and instructional time) is selected because the paragraph emphasizes assigning responsibility to specialized organizational bodies (e.g., ministries, commissions) for coordinating technical/scientific training. Other paragraphs (27-29, 34) address coordination, collaboration, and harmonization of efforts, which directly complement the target paragraph's focus on organizational roles and systemic coordination.
paragraphs.para_en: 9. The responsibility for promoting and coordinating measures aimed at stimulating the recruitment and training of technical and scientific personnel (action plans, curricula, documentation, etc.) should be entrusted to specialized bodies (general directorate of a ministry, ministerial or interministerial commission, planning commission, foundation, etc.) possessing the necessary authority and competence.

paragraphs.para: 10. Il est hautement souhaitable que ces organismes spécialisés bénéficient de la coopération d'organes consultatifs représentatifs de l'enseignement, de la science et de la technique, de l'industrie, de l'agriculture et du monde du travail.
paragraphs.think: Tags ACT_OTHER (Stakeholder focus | Other) and ACT_PRIV (Stakeholder focus | Private sector and industry) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes cooperation with advisory bodies representing industry, labor, and other sectors. Relations are identified as complemental (adding related context) or modifying (specifying conditions) with confidence ≥0.7, as the candidate paragraphs discuss collaboration frameworks, harmonization, financial coordination, and international partnerships that align with the target paragraph's focus on stakeholder cooperation.
paragraphs.para_en: 10. It is highly desirable that these specialized bodies benefit from the cooperation of advisory organs representative of education, science and technology, industry, agriculture, and the world of labor.

paragraphs.para: 11. Il conviendrait que les organismes responsables de la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques puissent participer à l'élaboration de la politique scolaire, scientifique et économique du pays.
paragraphs.think: The target paragraph emphasizes governance and planning (POL_GOV) by advocating for organizational participation in policy development. Paragraphs 29, 34, 36, and 74 address coordination, financial efforts, regional involvement, and institutional expansion—related aspects of governance and technical training. Relations are supported by shared focus on organizational collaboration and policy alignment.
paragraphs.para_en: 11. It would be appropriate for the organizations responsible for the training of technical and scientific executives to be able to participate in the development of the country’s educational, scientific, and economic policy.

paragraphs.para: 12. Lorsqu'il existe une pluralité d'organismes ou d'organes pour s'occuper de la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques, soit qu'ils relèvent de départements ministériels différents, soit qu'il s'en trouve à l'échelon fédéral ou central et à l'échelon régional ou local, il est hautement souhaitable d'assurer au maximum l'harmonisation de leurs activités afin d'éviter tout double emploi.
paragraphs.think: Tags CUR_OTHER (curriculum coordination) and ISC_99 (multiple education levels) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes harmonizing activities across different organizational levels (federal/regional) and avoids duplication. Para 34 directly addresses coordination of financial efforts across organizations (supporting). Para 36 mentions regional/local involvement in training (complemental). Para 30 discusses financial efforts for training (supporting) but with lower confidence as it focuses on funding rather than coordination.
paragraphs.para_en: 12. When there is a plurality of organizations or bodies responsible for the training of technical and scientific executives, whether they fall under different ministerial departments or are situated at the federal or central level as well as at the regional or local level, it is highly desirable to ensure, to the greatest extent possible, the harmonization of their activities in order to avoid any duplication of efforts.

paragraphs.para: 13. Quel que soit leur degré de développement économique et culturel, il importe que les pays prévoient un effort financier de plus en plus intense pour répondre à leurs besoins croissants en matière de formation de cadres — 201 techniques et scientifiques; bien qu'en règle générale cet effort financier ne doive pas se faire au détriment des autres ordres d'enseignement, il peut devenir nécessaire de procéder à une revision des structures scolaires et du rapport existant entre les diverses branches de l'enseignement afin d'éviter une prédominance excessive des études de culture purement générale ou humaniste.
paragraphs.think: Tags ISC_99 (multiple education levels) and CUR_OTHER (curriculum structure) are selected because the paragraph discusses balancing technical/scientific education with general studies and reviewing educational structures. O_All (combined general/vocational) applies due to the emphasis on integrating general and technical training. Related paragraphs provide supporting/complemental information about financial efforts, specific funding areas, general education importance, coordination, specialization, and international training.
paragraphs.para_en: 13. Regardless of their level of economic and cultural development, it is important that countries allocate an increasingly substantial financial effort to meet their growing needs for the training of technical and scientific personnel; although, as a general rule, this financial effort should not come at the expense of other levels of education, it may become necessary to review the school structures and the existing relationship between the various branches of education in order to avoid an excessive dominance of purely general or humanistic studies.

paragraphs.para: 14. Même dans les pays les moins favorisés, où l'effort requis peut paraître hors de mesure avec l'ensemble des ressources disponibles et avec l'ampleur des résultats qu'il serait possible d'obtenir dans la meilleure hypothèse, il importe de tout mettre en œuvre pour assurer la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques, condition indispensable de tout développement économique.
paragraphs.think: Tags POP_POOR and T_PDEV are selected because the paragraph emphasizes training for disadvantaged countries (POP_POOR) and professional development of technical/scientific personnel (T_PDEV). Related paragraphs provide complementary details on funding (32), exceptional measures (33), international mobility (76), coordination (34), and institutional distribution (41).
paragraphs.para_en: 14. Even in the least advantaged countries, where the required effort may seem disproportionate to the total available resources and to the scale of the results that could be achieved under the best circumstances, it is essential to do everything possible to ensure the training of technical and scientific personnel, an indispensable condition for any economic development.

paragraphs.para: 15. En fixant les crédits qui doivent être affectés à la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques, il convient de tenir compte notamment des exigences accrues dans les domaines suivants: a) création de nouveaux établissements en rapport avec les effectifs scolaires et avec les nouvelles spécialisations techniques et scientifiques; b) recrutement, formation, engagement et rémunération de personnel enseignant et de personnel de laboratoire et d'atelier; c) bâtiments en nombre suffisant, comprenant les salles, les laboratoires et les ateliers nécessaires; d) équipement technique et scientifique indispensable à l'enseignement et à la recherche; e) entretien et fonctionnement des diverses installations; /) aide aux étudiants, etc.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_RECR (recruitment of teaching staff) and T_COND (remuneration and working conditions) are directly mentioned in the text. INFRA_TLM (infrastructure/resources) applies to building requirements and equipment. Related paragraphs address complementary aspects (e.g., exceptional funding measures, coordination of financial contributions, institutional expansion, and facility requirements).
paragraphs.para_en: 15. When determining the appropriations to be allocated to the training of technical and scientific personnel, particular attention must be paid to the increased requirements in the following areas: a) the establishment of new institutions in accordance with school enrollment figures and new technical and scientific specializations; b) the recruitment, training, engagement, and remuneration of teaching staff as well as laboratory and workshop personnel; c) an adequate number of buildings, including the necessary classrooms, laboratories, and workshops; d) the technical and scientific equipment essential for teaching and research; e) the maintenance and operation of the various facilities; f) student assistance, etc.

paragraphs.para: 16. Etant donné l'urgence que présente, dans la plupart des pays, l'accroissement des cadres techniques et scientifiques, il se peut qu'en plus des prévisions budgétaires ordinaires on doive adopter des mesures d'exception telles que le recours à des budgets extraordinaires, la constitution de fonds spéciaux, nationaux et internationaux, l'appel à des contributions spéciales, etc.
paragraphs.think: The paragraph focuses on financing measures (extraordinary budgets, special funds, contributions) for technical/scientific personnel, directly aligning with POL_FIN. Related paragraphs discuss coordination of financial efforts (34), enterprise involvement/tax exemptions (37), technical assistance financing (76), and scholarship initiatives (79), all of which are specific financing mechanisms complementing or supporting the target's general discussion.
paragraphs.para_en: 16. Given the urgency presented, in most countries, by the need to increase the number of technical and scientific personnel, it may be necessary, in addition to ordinary budgetary forecasts, to adopt exceptional measures such as resorting to extraordinary budgets, establishing special national and international funds, calling for special contributions, etc.

paragraphs.para: 17. Il convient d'assurer au maximum la coordination des efforts financiers consentis par les différents organismes participant au développement des cadres techniques et scientifiques, surtout dans les pays où plusieurs départements ministériels ou administrations contribuent à la formation de ces cadres.
paragraphs.think: Tags POL_FIN (financing coordination) and POL_INTCOOP (international collaboration) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes coordinating financial contributions across organizations (POL_FIN) and implies multi-stakeholder cooperation. Related paragraphs discuss financial involvement (36, 38), training development (74), regional pooling (75), and scholarship initiatives (79), all complementing the target's focus on coordinated financial efforts for technical/scientific personnel.
paragraphs.para_en: 17. Efforts should be made to maximize the coordination of financial contributions made by the various organizations involved in the development of technical and scientific personnel, especially in countries where multiple ministerial departments or administrations contribute to the training of such personnel.

paragraphs.para: 18. Dans les pays de type fédératif, une aide plus ou moins substantielle du gouvernement fédéral peut s'avérer nécessaire; toutefois, il est à souhaiter que les droits et caractères culturels propres aux divers éléments constitutifs de la fédération soient sauvegardés.
paragraphs.think: Tags LAW_CONSTI (constitutional rights preservation) and POL_OTH (policy theme of federal assistance) are selected. Related paragraphs discuss federal/centralized systems (36, 37, 75), technical personnel development (36, 37, 76), and expert deployment (78), which share thematic connections to federal governance and resource allocation. Confidence scores reflect varying degrees of semantic alignment.
paragraphs.para_en: 18. In federal-type countries, more or less substantial assistance from the federal government may prove necessary; however, it is desirable that the cultural rights and characteristics specific to the various constituent elements of the federation be preserved.

paragraphs.para: 19. Dans les pays dont le système scolaire est centralisé, il y a tout intérêt à associer financièrement, lorsque les circonstances s'y prêtent, les autorités régionales ou locales aux mesures prises en vue de faciliter le recrutement et la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques.
paragraphs.think: Tags POL_FIN and T_RECR are selected because the paragraph focuses on financial involvement of regional authorities in recruitment/training (POL_FIN) and explicitly mentions recruitment of technical/scientific personnel (T_RECR). Related paragraphs discuss financial strategies (37, 38, 79), regional collaboration (75), and international training support (76), all complementing the target paragraph's focus on financing and recruitment.
paragraphs.para_en: 19. In countries with a centralized school system, it is advisable, when circumstances allow, to financially involve regional or local authorities in the measures taken to facilitate the recruitment and training of technical and scientific personnel.

paragraphs.para: 20. Dans les pays où le système économique le permet, il convient d'associer à cet effort financier les entreprises de production, qui seront les premières à bénéficier de l'accroissement des cadres techniques et scientifiques; au nombre des mesures propres à encourager les entreprises privées dans cette voie, il y a lieu de signaler les exonérations fiscales.
paragraphs.think: The tags ACT_PRIV (private sector involvement) and POL_FIN (financing measures) are directly supported by the text's focus on private enterprises and tax exemptions. Paragraph 38 complements this by detailing additional private sector financial efforts (training institutions, tax exemptions), establishing a clear semantic connection with high confidence.
paragraphs.para_en: 20. In countries where the economic system permits, production enterprises should be associated with this financial effort, as they will be the first to benefit from an increase in technical and scientific personnel; among the measures designed to encourage private enterprises in this direction, tax exemptions should be noted.

paragraphs.para: 21. Parmi les formes que peut présenter l'effort financier du secteur privé, il convient de noter: la mise sur pied, pour le compte de grandes entreprises, d'établissements de formation de cadres techniques ou d'instituts de recherche scientifique; la constitution de fonds spéciaux propres à un groupe d'entreprises ou la participation à des fonds de caractère plus général constitués par les pouvoirs publics avec appel à l'initiative privée; l'octroi direct de subventions à certaines institutions; le versement d'une contribution spéciale destinée à développer la formation des cadres; l'institution de bourses spéciales destinées à encourager certaines études ou certains travaux de recherche, etc.
paragraphs.think: Tags ACT_PRIV and POL_FIN are selected because the paragraph focuses on private sector financial efforts (ACT_PRIV) and financing/resource mobilization (POL_FIN). Related paragraphs discuss training institutions (39, 57), scholarships (79), and technical education (40, 74), which align with the target's themes of private sector contributions to technical/scientific training. Relations are complemental as they expand on related aspects of training and funding mechanisms.
paragraphs.para_en: 21. Among the forms that private sector financial efforts may take, it is important to note: the establishment, on behalf of large companies, of training institutions for technical executives or scientific research institutes; the creation of special funds specific to a group of companies or participation in more general funds established by public authorities with the involvement of private initiative; the direct granting of subsidies to certain institutions; the payment of a special contribution intended to develop executive training; the institution of special scholarships aimed at encouraging certain studies or specific research work, etc.

paragraphs.para: 22. Il convient de tout mettre en œuvre pour multiplier les institutions capables d'assurer la formation de cadres techniques et scientifiques, qu'il s'agisse d'établissements d'enseignement du second degré ou d'établissements d'enseignement supérieur; il faut également s'efforcer d'augmenter le nombre des places disponibles dans les établissements déjà existants, tout en veillant à ce que cet accroissement n'entraîne pas un abaissement du niveau des études.
paragraphs.think: Tags ISC_99 (multiple levels) and ISC_23 (secondary unspecified) are selected because the paragraph explicitly mentions both secondary and higher education institutions. Relations are identified based on thematic overlap: para 40 (supporting) aligns with technical training courses; para 41 (complemental) addresses institutional distribution; para 44 (supporting) focuses on institutional expansion; para 46 (complemental) emphasizes practical training; para 57 (supporting) links to general education; para 74 (supporting) discusses institutional development through technical assistance.
paragraphs.para_en: Every effort must be made to increase the number of institutions capable of providing training for technical and scientific executives, whether these are secondary education institutions or higher education establishments; efforts must also be made to raise the number of available places in existing institutions, while ensuring that this increase does not lead to a lowering of academic standards.

paragraphs.para: 23: Pour être complet, tout système d'enseignement doit, en plus des moyens destinés à former des chercheurs et des ingénieurs, comporter la création, à l'intention des techniciens et des ouvriers spécialisés, de cours et de diplômes dont la valeur soit pleinement reconnue dans la profession.
paragraphs.think: Tags F_VET (Vocational and technical skills) and O_All (Combined general and vocational) are selected because the paragraph explicitly emphasizes creating courses for technicians/skilled workers (F_VET) and integrates vocational training with broader education systems (O_All). For relations: Para 44 complements by specifying structural requirements for technical training, while Para 57 complements by addressing the balance between general education and technical training.
paragraphs.para_en: To be complete, any education system must, in addition to the means intended to train researchers and engineers, include the creation of courses and diplomas aimed at technicians and skilled workers, whose value is fully recognized within the profession.

paragraphs.para: 24. Dans toute la mesure du possible, les établissements de formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques devront être répartis rationnellement sur l'ensemble du territoire; dans le cas d'enseignements spécialisés, il convient de tenir compte des caractéristiques de la production des régions où seront situés ces établissements.
paragraphs.think: Tags POP_RUR (Rural and remote learners) and O_All (Combined general and vocational) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes rational distribution across the territory (implying rural/remote considerations) and mentions specialized education (vocational) alongside general population access (general). Related paragraphs discuss specialization (43), regional institutions (75), general education for technical executives (57), and graduate allocation (72), all of which complement the target's focus on regional distribution and educational balance.
paragraphs.para_en: 24. As far as possible, institutions for the training of technical and scientific personnel should be distributed rationally across the entire territory; in the case of specialized education, the characteristics of the production in the regions where these institutions will be located must be taken into account.

paragraphs.para: 25. Dans toute la mesure du possible, la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques doit se faire dans la langue nationale, qui seule permet à la masse et aux travailleurs l'accès aux éléments essentiels des sciences et de la technique.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) apply because the paragraph emphasizes training technical/scientific personnel. POP_RUR (Rural and remote learners) is selected as the national language access is critical for broader population inclusion, implying rural/remote relevance. Relations: Para 44 (complemental) discusses structural training frameworks; 49 (complemental) addresses advanced training; 50 (complemental) focuses on institutional resources; 57 (supporting) highlights general education's role in technical training; 58 (complemental) addresses workforce upskilling.
paragraphs.para_en: 25. To the greatest extent possible, the training of technical and scientific personnel must be conducted in the national language, which alone allows the general population and workers to access the essential elements of science and technology.

paragraphs.para: 26. Le progrès scientifique, d'une part, et les perfectionnements et innovations en matière de techniques de production, d'autre part, exigent une spécialisation croissante dans les enseignements techniques et dans dente danses de les diplômes; toutefois, il convient d'éviter tout excès de spécialisation, surtout à l'échelon moyen de la formation, à la fois pour répondre à certaines exigences d'ordre pédagogique et pour faciliter ultérieurement le passage d'une activité professionnelle à l'autre.
paragraphs.think: Tags POL_QUAL (Quality and learning outcomes) and F_VET (Vocational and technical skills) are selected because the paragraph discusses balancing specialization with pedagogical quality and technical training. Related paragraphs address complementary aspects like institutional structure (44), advanced specialization (45), practical integration (46), continuous training (49), general education (57), and technical assistance (74), all of which align with the target's focus on technical education quality and specialization.
paragraphs.para_en: 26. Scientific progress, on the one hand, and improvements and innovations in production techniques, on the other hand, require increasing specialization in technical education and consequently in qualifications; however, it is necessary to avoid excessive specialization, especially at the intermediate level of training, both to meet certain pedagogical requirements and to facilitate, later on, the transition from one professional activity to another.

paragraphs.para: 27. Pour satisfaire aux besoins en matière de cadres techniques et scientifiques, il ne suffit pas de multiplier les cours spéciaux; il faut créer des sections complètes, des départements ou, éventuellement, des facultés.
paragraphs.think: Tags CUR_CONTENT and F_SCI are selected because the paragraph discusses curriculum structure (sections/departments) and focuses on technical/scientific personnel. Related paragraphs provide complementary or supporting information about advanced education structures, practical training, accessibility, general education, and institutional development.
paragraphs.para_en: 27. To meet the needs for technical and scientific personnel, it is not sufficient to increase the number of special courses; it is necessary to establish complete sections, departments, or, where appropriate, faculties.

paragraphs.para: 28. Outre la formation spécialisée qu'assurent les cycles réguliers d'études, il convient d'encourager la création, à l'issue de ces cycles, d'études de spécialisation plus poussée aux niveaux postsecondaire et postuniversitaire, ainsi que l'introduction d'un doctorat technique.
paragraphs.think: Tags ISC_8 (Doctoral or equivalent) and ISC_99 (Multiple levels) are selected because the paragraph explicitly mentions post-secondary/post-graduate levels and a technical doctorate. Related paragraphs: 46 (complemental: both discuss advanced training but focus on different aspects), 47 (supporting: addresses the problem of personnel shortage that the target paragraph's solutions aim to resolve), 49 (complemental: both emphasize advanced training for technical fields), and 74 (supporting: aligns with the goal of developing technical executives through education).
paragraphs.para_en: 28. In addition to the specialized training provided by regular study cycles, it is advisable to encourage the establishment, following these cycles, of more advanced specialization studies at the post-secondary and post-graduate levels, as well as the introduction of a technical doctorate.

paragraphs.para: 29. En vue d'améliorer la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques et de la rendre plus efficace, il conviendrait d'associer davantage la pratique à la théorie en accordant plus d'attention aux travaux pratiques dans les entreprises industrielles, les laboratoires et les instituts de recherche tout en multipliant les cours supérieurs de physique et de mathématiques.
paragraphs.think: Tags CUR_CONTENT (curriculum content) and F_SCI/F_MATH (science/math subjects) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes integrating practical work with theory and increasing advanced courses in physics/math. Related paragraphs: 47 (complemental - recruitment challenges for teachers), 49 (supporting - advanced training courses), 51 (complemental - experimental mindset development), 57 (complemental - general education alongside technical training), and 74 (supporting - technical training intensification).
paragraphs.para_en: 29. In order to improve the training of technical and scientific personnel and to make it more effective, greater integration of practical experience with theory should be pursued by placing more emphasis on practical work within industrial enterprises, laboratories, and research institutes, while also increasing the number of advanced courses in physics and mathematics.

paragraphs.para: 30. La pénurie de cadres techniques et scientifiques exerce une influence défavorable sur le recrutement des maîtres chargés de la formation de ces cadres; des mesures sérieuses s'imposent pour attirer ou retenir dans l'enseignement les techniciens, les ingénieurs et les chercheurs tentés par les conditions plus avantageuses qui leur sont faites dans la production et pour orienter vers l'enseignement et la recherche une proportion suffisante des meilleurs élèves de l'un ou l'autre sexe issus de l'enseignement du second degré ou de l'enseignement supérieur.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_SUPP (teacher supply shortages) and T_RECR (recruitment) directly address the shortage of technical/scientific personnel and recruitment challenges mentioned. POL_TEACH (workforce policies) applies due to the emphasis on policy measures. Paragraph 48 supports the need for recruitment policies. Other paragraphs provide complementary details on training, facilities, and education frameworks.
paragraphs.para_en: 30. The shortage of technical and scientific personnel exerts an adverse influence on the recruitment of instructors responsible for training such personnel; serious measures are necessary to attract or retain technicians, engineers, and researchers in education, who may be enticed by more favorable conditions in production, and to direct a sufficient proportion of the best male and female students from secondary or higher education towards teaching and research.

paragraphs.para: 31. Parmi les mesures pouvant contribuer à accroître le nombre des maîtres qualifiés, notamment de ceux qui se consacrent uniquement à l'einseignment, on peut signaler les facilités propres à élargir le recrutement et à assurer la formation du personnel de l'enseignement du second degré et de l'enseignement supérieur, l'adoption de traitements suffisants, une reconnaissance accrue de la valeur et de l'importance du travail du maître et l'amélioration de la sécurité sociale du corps enseignant; en dehors du personnel engagé à titre permanent, il peut être utile de confier des enseignements à temps partiel aux membres des cadres de la production et de la recherche.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_RECR and T_COND are selected because the paragraph focuses on recruitment measures (e.g., broadening recruitment, part-time teaching) and working conditions (e.g., remuneration, social security). Related paragraphs discuss training (49, 50, 74), worker education (64), and student support (69), which complement the target's focus on teacher training and professional development.
paragraphs.para_en: 31. Among the measures that could help increase the number of qualified teachers, particularly those who dedicate themselves solely to teaching, are provisions aimed at broadening recruitment and ensuring the training of staff for secondary and higher education, the adoption of adequate remuneration, increased recognition of the value and importance of the teacher’s work, and the improvement of social security for the teaching profession; aside from permanently employed personnel, it may be useful to entrust part-time teaching duties to members of the production and research sectors.

paragraphs.para: 32. Des cours de perfectionnement sont en général nécessaires pour tenir le personnel au courant des progrès réalisés dans le domaine des sciences et de la technique et dans les méthodes de démonstration et d'enseignement qui leur conviennent.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_PDEV and CUR_IMPL are selected because the paragraph emphasizes professional development (training courses for personnel) and curriculum implementation (teaching methods). Related paragraphs discuss training infrastructure (50), teaching methods (51), equipment maintenance (53), general education balance (57), lifelong learning (58), and technical assistance for training (74). Relations are determined by thematic alignment and complementary/supporting connections.
paragraphs.para_en: 32. Advanced training courses are generally necessary to keep personnel abreast of progress made in the fields of science and technology, as well as in the demonstration and teaching methods appropriate to them.

paragraphs.para: 33. Afin d'assurer la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques qu'exige la vie moderne, il est souhaitable que les établissements d'enseignement technique supérieur et les universités puissent disposer de moyens de travail scientifique avancé et de moyens de recherche qui attirent le personnel enseignant, les étudiants et les chercheurs diplômés, grâce à l'installation de laboratoires dotés d'un équipement scientifique et technique perfectionné et de bibliothèques scientifiques et techniques.
paragraphs.think: The tag INFRA_LABS is selected because the paragraph explicitly mentions laboratories and scientific libraries as critical infrastructure for training technical/scientific personnel. Related paragraphs: 52 (complemental) discusses practical work/laboratories in education, directly aligning with the target's focus on lab facilities. 53 (supporting) emphasizes equipment updates and collaboration, reinforcing the need for advanced resources. 57 (modifying) adds context about balancing general education with technical training. 51 (complemental) addresses methods to foster scientific interest, which complements the infrastructure's role in education.
paragraphs.para_en: 33. In order to ensure the training of the technical and scientific personnel required by modern life, it is desirable that institutions of higher technical education and universities have access to advanced scientific working facilities and research resources that attract teaching staff, students, and graduate researchers, through the establishment of laboratories equipped with sophisticated scientific and technical equipment, as well as scientific and technical libraries.

paragraphs.para: 34. Afin d'accroître, dès l'école primaire, l'intérêt des élèves pour les études techniques et scientifiques, il convient d'utiliser des méthodes actives propres à développer chez eux l'esprit expérimental.
paragraphs.think: Tags PEDAG_METHO (teaching methods) and ISC_1 (primary education) are selected because the paragraph explicitly discusses active teaching methods for primary school students. Related paragraphs: 52 (complemental - practical work in curricula), 53 (supporting - equipment and collaboration for scientific learning), 54 (complemental - guidance services for technical careers), 57 (complemental - general education alongside technical training).
paragraphs.para_en: 34. In order to increase, from primary school onwards, students' interest in technical and scientific studies, it is appropriate to use active methods designed to develop in them an experimental mindset.

paragraphs.para: 35. Il convient de réserver la place qui leur est due aux mathématiques et aux sciences dans les plans d'études de l'école primaire et de l'école secondaire, mais aussi de consacrer le temps nécessaire aux exercices et travaux pratiques, aux travaux de laboratoire, aux travaux manuels et agricoles, etc.
paragraphs.think: Tags F_MATH (mathematics/sciences focus), CUR_CONTENT (curriculum content emphasis), and CUR_ORG (time allocation for practical work) are directly supported. Paragraph 53 (36) complements by addressing science equipment and collaboration, while 57 (40) complements by emphasizing general education alongside technical training.
paragraphs.para_en: 35. The rightful place must be reserved for mathematics and the sciences in the curricula of both primary and secondary schools, and adequate time must also be devoted to exercises and practical work, laboratory work, manual and agricultural activities, etc.

paragraphs.para: 36. Le développement toujours plus rapide des sciences et de la technique exige que le matériel utilisé dans les écoles soit adéquat et tenu à jour; il devrait y avoir collaboration constante entre maitres et hommes de science dans leurs recherches pour concevoir et développer le matériel et — 204 — les installations nécessaires à la compréhension des notions scientifiques de base dans l'enseignement du second degré et dans l'enseignement supérieur ; il est à noter que les techniques de diffusion collective (radio, télévision, cinéma, etc.) peuvent contribuer largement à informer la jeunesse et à éveiller son intérêt pour les carrières scientifiques et techniques.
paragraphs.think: Tags INFRA_TLM and PEDAG_TECH are selected because the paragraph emphasizes equipment/facilities (INFRA_TLM) and technology's role in education (PEDAG_TECH). Related paragraphs: 54 (complemental - career guidance links to youth interest in sciences), 55 (complemental - guides for education/careers align with informing youth), 74 (supporting - technical training aligns with equipment development), 77 (complemental - direct mention of scientific equipment).
paragraphs.para_en: 36. The increasingly rapid development of science and technology requires that the equipment used in schools be adequate and kept up to date; there should be constant collaboration between teachers and scientists in their research to design and develop the equipment and — 204 — facilities necessary for the understanding of basic scientific concepts in secondary and higher education; it should be noted that mass communication technologies (radio, television, cinema, etc.) can greatly contribute to informing young people and stimulating their interest in scientific and technical careers.

paragraphs.para: 37. Il y a tout intérêt à établir, au sein de l'enseignement primaire et des enseignements postprimaires, un service d'orientation scolaire opérant en liaison avec le service d'orientation professionnelle, car ces deux services sont appelés à jouer un rôle de plus en plus important dans le dépistage et la sélection des futurs cadres techniques et scientifiques ; là où il n'existe pas de services d'orientation à proprement parler, les maîtres devraient avoir la possibilité de s'initier aux techniques qui peuvent être utilisées avec succès pour assurer l'orientation scolaire et professionnelle de leurs élèves.
paragraphs.think: Tags O_All and O_VET are selected because the paragraph emphasizes school/vocational guidance services for technical/scientific cadre development. Related paragraphs provide complementary information on guidance materials (55), orientation cycles (56), general education integration (57), adult education access (58), non-technical to technical transition (65), and technical training expansion (74). All relations are complemental with high confidence as they address interconnected aspects of education and career development.
paragraphs.para_en: 37. It is highly advantageous to establish, within primary and post-primary education, a school guidance service operating in connection with the vocational guidance service, as these two services are expected to play an increasingly important role in the identification and selection of future technical and scientific cadres; where proper guidance services do not exist, teachers should have the opportunity to familiarize themselves with techniques that can be successfully used to ensure the educational and vocational guidance of their students.

paragraphs.para: 38. Pour orienter les élèves et les parents dans leur choix des études et des professions, il conviendrait de rédiger des guides traitant des études secondaires et supérieures, des conditions requises pour les entreprendre et des débouchés auxquels elles conduisent.
paragraphs.think: Tags 'Education orientation' and 'Combined general and vocational' are selected because the paragraph focuses on guiding students/parents through educational choices (orientation) and addresses both general and vocational pathways. Related paragraphs discuss orientation cycles (56), higher education access (63), technical training support (65), worker education (58), and employment facilitation (71), all of which complement the target's focus on career guidance and educational pathways.
paragraphs.para_en: 38. To guide students and parents in their choice of studies and professions, it would be appropriate to prepare guides addressing secondary and higher education, the requirements for undertaking them, and the career opportunities to which they lead.

paragraphs.para: 39. La structure du système scolaire doit permettre d'éviter que le choix de la section d'études préparant à telle ou telle profession se décide trop tôt; on y parviendra notamment par la création d'un cycle d'orientation au seuil de l'enseignement du second degré.
paragraphs.think: Tags 'nan' (Education orientation) and 'ISC_2' (Lower secondary education) are selected because the paragraph explicitly discusses orientation cycles at the secondary education entrance (ISCED 2) and the broader goal of preventing premature specialization. For relations: Para 57 supports the emphasis on general education (aligning with orientation's purpose). Para 63 complements by addressing access to higher education, which is a downstream outcome of secondary orientation. Para 73 complements by discussing support measures for career transitions, which are related to the long-term impact of orientation systems.
paragraphs.para_en: 39. The structure of the school system must be designed to prevent the choice of the study track preparing for a particular profession from being made too early; this can be achieved notably through the creation of an orientation cycle at the entrance to secondary education.

paragraphs.para: 40. Au moment où l'on s'efforce d'intensifier la formation spécialisée des futurs cadres techniques et scientifiques, il convient d'accorder l'importance nécessaire, dans la préparation de ces cadres, aux disciplines de culture générale et à tout ce qui peut contribuer à cultiver l'esprit.
paragraphs.think: Tags O_G (General academic education) and CUR_CONTENT (Curriculum content) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes the importance of general education subjects and cultivating the mind in technical/scientific training. Para 58 is complemental (confidence 0.7) as it expands on supporting workers' education, which aligns with preparing executives. Para 74 is supporting (confidence 0.9) as it directly addresses intensifying training for technical/scientific executives, matching the target's focus.
paragraphs.para_en: At a time when efforts are being made to intensify the specialized training of future technical and scientific executives, it is essential to accord the necessary importance, in the preparation of these executives, to general education subjects and to all that can contribute to cultivating the mind.

paragraphs.para: 41. Il importe d'offrir aux travailleurs qui exercent déjà une profession toutes facilités (notamment sous forme de stages rémunérés) pour qu'ils puissent entreprendre des études techniques ou scientifiques de niveau secondaire ou supérieur leur permettant d'accéder aux fonctions dévolues aux cadres.
paragraphs.think: Tags F_VET (technical/scientific training), ISC_3 (upper secondary), and ISC_4 (post-secondary non-tertiary) are selected because the paragraph explicitly mentions support for workers to pursue technical/scientific studies at secondary or higher levels. Relations are identified based on shared themes of part-time education methods (59, 60, 65), access to higher education (63), and work-study integration (70, 74). Confidence scores reflect the strength of semantic alignment.
paragraphs.para_en: It is important to provide workers who are already practicing a profession with all possible support (notably in the form of paid internships) so that they can undertake technical or scientific studies at the secondary or higher level, enabling them to access the functions assigned to managerial staff.

paragraphs.para: 42. Au nombre des méthodes de l'enseignement à temps partiel destiné aux travailleurs, les cours du soir portant sur des sujets techniques et scientifiques ont joué et continueront à jouer un certain rôle; cependant, dans bien des cas, l'ampleur et la complexité de la technique moderne exigent une formation technique et scientifique pour laquelle les cours du soir ne sauraient suffire.
paragraphs.think: Tags F_VET and O_VET are selected because the paragraph discusses vocational/technical skills (F_VET) and education orientation for vocational/technical fields (O_VET). Paragraph 60 provides an alternative method (paid leave) for part-time education, complementing the target's discussion of evening courses. Paragraph 61 introduces a structured training system, adding related but independent information. Paragraph 65 addresses supplementary training for non-technical graduates, aligning with the need for more comprehensive technical education.
paragraphs.para_en: 42. Among the methods of part-time education intended for workers, evening courses on technical and scientific subjects have played and will continue to play a certain role; however, in many cases, the scope and complexity of modern technology require technical and scientific training for which evening courses alone cannot suffice.

paragraphs.para: 43. Il convient de signaler l'efficacité du système selon lequel les employeurs accordent à certains de leurs travailleurs des congés payés pendant une partie de la semaine pour leur permettre d'assister à des cours techniques et scientifiques à temps partiel; une autre façon de procéder consisterait à bloquer en un ou plusieurs congés le même nombre de jours de congé pour permettre aux intéressés de suivre leurs cours dans de meilleures conditions.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_COND (Working conditions and salaries) and CUR_ORG (Curriculum | Organization and instructional time) are selected because the paragraph discusses paid leave systems for workers attending courses (working conditions) and the structure of instructional time (curriculum organization). Related paragraphs: 61 (complemental - work-integrated learning systems), 62 (complemental - alternative education methods), 64 (complemental - measures for worker education), and 70 (supporting - work-study integration).
paragraphs.para_en: 43. It is appropriate to highlight the effectiveness of the system whereby employers grant certain workers paid leave for part of the week to enable them to attend part-time technical and scientific courses; another approach would be to consolidate the same number of leave days into one or more blocks to allow the individuals to follow their courses under better conditions.

paragraphs.para: 44. Il convient de signaler également le système qui consiste à grouper l'instruction théorique dans des établissements d'enseignement technique, et la formation pratique reconnue dans des entreprises; ce système comprend — 205 — normalement des périodes d'égale durée consacrées alternativement à la formation pratique et à l'instruction théorique, l'une et l'autre étant soigneusement coordonnées et contrôlées; il est courant que les intéressés soient rémunérés, pendant toute la durée de leur préparation, par les entreprises responsables de leur formation pratique.
paragraphs.think: The tags 'CUR_ORG' (Curriculum | Organization and instructional time) and 'T_COND' (Teachers | Working conditions and salaries) are selected because the paragraph describes a structured training system with alternating theoretical and practical periods (CUR_ORG) and mentions remuneration during training (T_COND). Paragraph 64 is related as it discusses measures to support worker training while employed, which complements the target paragraph's focus on practical training coordination and worker benefits.
paragraphs.para_en: 44. The system consisting of grouping theoretical instruction in technical education institutions and recognized practical training in enterprises should also be noted; this system normally includes periods of equal duration alternately devoted to practical training and theoretical instruction, both being carefully coordinated and supervised; it is common for the individuals concerned to be remunerated throughout the duration of their training by the enterprises responsible for their practical training.

paragraphs.para: 45. Des cours par correspondance, éventuellement complétés par les moyens audio-visuels appropriés (radio, télévision, cinéma, etc.) peuvent aider efficacement les travailleurs qui désirent perfectionner leurs connaissances techniques ou scientifiques en vue d'accéder à un poste supérieur.
paragraphs.think: The target paragraph focuses on non-formal education (M_NFORM) through correspondence courses and audiovisual means for workers seeking technical/scientific advancement. Para 63 discusses access to higher education for technical graduates/workers, complementing the target's focus on worker education. Para 64 explicitly supports worker training measures, aligning with the target's goal. Para 65 addresses non-technical graduates entering technical sectors, matching the target's intent. Para 70 relates to work-study balance, which is indirectly complementary. Confidence scores reflect the strength of these connections.
paragraphs.para_en: Correspondence courses, possibly supplemented by appropriate audiovisual means (radio, television, cinema, etc.), can effectively assist workers who wish to improve their technical or scientific knowledge in order to qualify for a higher position.

paragraphs.para: 46. L'accès à l'enseignement supérieur et à l'université devrait être accordé non seulement aux diplômés de l'enseignement général du second degré, mais aussi, moyennant un stage de préparation ou un examen d'admission, aux diplômés de l'enseignement technique du second degré et aux travailleurs en cours d'emploi.
paragraphs.think: Tags ISC_3 (upper secondary education) and ISC_6 (bachelor level) are selected because the paragraph explicitly mentions access to higher education (ISC_6) and technical secondary education (ISC_3). Related paragraphs discuss complementary measures (e.g., worker training, transitioning to technical fields, student support) that align with the target's focus on expanding educational access and workforce integration.
paragraphs.para_en: 46. Access to higher education and university should be granted not only to graduates of general secondary education but also, subject to a preparatory internship or an entrance examination, to graduates of technical secondary education and to workers currently employed.

paragraphs.para: 47. D'une manière générale, toute mesure destinée à faciliter la formation générale et le perfectionnement des travailleurs en cours d'emploi, enrichissement qui intéresse les entreprises aussi bien que les travailleurs eux-mêmes, doit être considérée comme une contribution indirecte à la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques et, de ce fait, mérite d'être fortement encouragée.
paragraphs.think: Tags O_All (combined general and vocational) and T_PDEV (professional development) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes general training and further education for workers, which aligns with combined general/vocational education and professional development. Related paragraphs address complementary measures (65, 70), supporting policies (66, 74, 79) that align with the target's focus on technical/scientific training and encouragement of educational initiatives.
paragraphs.para_en: 47. In general, any measure aimed at facilitating the general training and further education of workers while employed, an enrichment that benefits both enterprises and the workers themselves, should be regarded as an indirect contribution to the training of technical and scientific personnel and, as such, deserves strong encouragement.

paragraphs.para: 48. Il convient d'offrir des facilités aux personnes ayant fait des études secondaires ou supérieures de caractère non technique qui désireraient compléter leur formation en vue d'occuper un emploi dans un secteur technique ou scientifique.
paragraphs.think: Tags ISC_23 (Secondary education unspecified) and ISC_4 (Post-secondary non-tertiary) are selected because the paragraph explicitly mentions 'secondary or higher education of a non-technical nature,' covering both secondary (ISC_23) and post-secondary non-technical (ISC_4) levels. For relations: Paragraph 66 (scholarships for technical studies) supports the target's goal of enabling non-technical individuals to pursue technical fields (confidence 0.9). Paragraph 79 (encouraging scholarships for technical/scientific studies) directly aligns with the target's objective (confidence 0.9). Paragraph 70 (work-integrated learning) complements the target's focus on supplementing training (confidence 0.7). Paragraph 74 (training technical executives) provides additional context on technical education development (confidence 0.8).
paragraphs.para_en: 48. Facilities should be provided to individuals who have completed secondary or higher education of a non-technical nature and wish to supplement their training in order to take up employment in a technical or scientific sector.

paragraphs.para: 49. L'octroi de bourses ou de subsides pour les frais d'études et d'entretien constitue un des moyens les plus efficaces d'accroître le nombre des candidats aux études techniques et scientifiques.
paragraphs.think: Tags POL_FIN (Financing) and ISC_6 (Bachelor level) are selected because the paragraph focuses on financial support (scholarships/subsidies) for technical/scientific education, which aligns with financing policies and bachelor-level education. Related paragraphs 67 (low fees/exemptions), 69 (transport discounts/social security), and 79 (international scholarships) all address financial aid mechanisms that complement the target paragraph's discussion on subsidies.
paragraphs.para_en: The granting of scholarships or subsidies for study and living expenses is one of the most effective means of increasing the number of candidates for technical and scientific studies.

paragraphs.para: 50. Il est hautement souhaitable que le montant des frais d'inscription et de scolarité soit aussi réduit que possible et que les étudiants de condition modeste puissent en être exonérés d'une façon directe ou indirecte; l'idéal, en ce qui concerne l'enseignement public, demeure la gratuité totale de tous les types d'études à tous les degrés.
paragraphs.think: Tags POL_EQUIT (access equity) and POP_POOR (low-income students) directly match the focus on reducing fees for disadvantaged groups. M_FORM (formal education) applies to public education mentioned. Paragraph 69 complements by addressing transportation discounts and social security for students. Paragraph 73 complements with financial support measures for career starters, both aligning with broader equity goals.
paragraphs.para_en: 50. It is highly desirable that the amount of registration and tuition fees be kept as low as possible and that students from modest backgrounds be exempted from these fees either directly or indirectly; the ideal, with regard to public education, remains the total free provision of all types of studies at all levels.

paragraphs.para: 51. La généralisation du système des foyers d'étudiants avec internat constitue une des meilleurs solutions au problème du logement, au même titre que la généralisation des restaurants scolaires ou universitaires permet de résoudre le problème d'une alimentation saine et économique.
paragraphs.think: The paragraph discusses expanding student residences (INFRA_BUILD) and school cafeterias (POL_WELLB for nutrition). Paragraph 74 mentions expanding institutions, which aligns with the expansion of physical infrastructure. Paragraph 75 refers to creating regional institutions, which complements the idea of infrastructure development for education.
paragraphs.para_en: The expansion of the system of student residences with boarding facilities constitutes one of the best solutions to the housing problem, just as the expansion of school or university cafeterias helps to solve the problem of healthy and affordable nutrition.

paragraphs.para: 52. Parmi les moyens qui peuvent également contribuer à élargir la base du recrutement des futurs cadres techniques et scientifiques, les autorités responsables devraient considérer la possibilité d'accorder aux étudiants et aux stagiaires des réductions sur le prix des moyens de transport, et de les faire bénéficier de mesures de sécurité sociale telles que la gratuité des soins médicaux, les séjours de vacances gratuits ou à prix réduit, etc.
paragraphs.think: Tags INFRA_TRANS (transport discounts) and POL_WELLB (free medical care) are directly mentioned. Paragraph 70 (work opportunities) complements by addressing financial support for students. Paragraph 73 (loans/support systems) aligns with social security measures. Paragraph 79 (scholarships) relates to financial aid for education, all as complemental policies.
paragraphs.para_en: Among the measures that can also contribute to broadening the recruitment base of future technical and scientific executives, the responsible authorities should consider the possibility of granting students and trainees discounts on transportation costs, as well as enabling them to benefit from social security measures such as free medical care, free or reduced-price holiday stays, etc.

paragraphs.para: 53. Les offres de travail rémunéré compatible avec les études et s'effectuant, de préférence, sous forme de stage complémentaire aux cours peuvent être considérées comme une forme d'aide sociale à laquelle il serait souhaitable de recourir ; il conviendrait également de prendre toute mesure nécessaire pour éviter, de la part des employeurs, toute possibilité d'abus en matière de travail ou de rémunération des étudiants.
paragraphs.think: Tags ACT_STUD (learners/students) and T_COND (working conditions/salaries) are selected because the paragraph focuses on student work opportunities, internships, and employer abuse prevention. Related paragraphs discuss employment assistance (71), job allocation (72), career support measures (73), scholarships (79), and technical training (74/76), all of which complement the target's focus on student employment and training systems.
paragraphs.para_en: 53. Paid work opportunities compatible with studies and preferably conducted in the form of internships complementary to coursework can be considered a form of social assistance that it would be desirable to utilize; it would also be appropriate to take all necessary measures to prevent any potential abuse by employers regarding the work or remuneration of students.

paragraphs.para: 54. Des organismes gouvernementaux ou privés devraient être chargés d'aider les jeunes diplômés à trouver un emploi et de faciliter leurs débuts dans le métier ou la profession; pour sauvegarder les intérêts de l'industrie comme ceux des diplômés, il conviendrait de veiller à ce que ces derniers soient toujours engagés et employés à un niveau correspondant à leurs compétences.
paragraphs.think: Tags ACT_PRIV (private sector involvement), POP_YOUTH (focus on young graduates), T_RECR (recruitment/hiring), and O_All (vocational/educational orientation) are directly supported by the text. Relations: Para 72 (complemental) adds job allocation methods; Para 73 (complemental) provides additional support measures; Para 78 (supporting) aligns with ensuring skill-based employment; Para 79 (complemental) expands on educational support for graduates.
paragraphs.para_en: Governmental or private organizations should be tasked with assisting young graduates in finding employment and facilitating their entry into their trade or profession; to safeguard the interests of both industry and the graduates, it is essential to ensure that the latter are consistently hired and employed at a level commensurate with their skills.

paragraphs.para: 55. Dans les pays où les jeunes diplômés sont affectés dans les régions où leur concours est considéré comme le plus utile, il devra être tenu compte de leurs préférences, de leur lieu d'origine, de leurs conditions de famille, etc.; un système qui mérite d'être généralisé est la répartition des jeunes diplômés en fonction des offres de travail dont la liste est dressée sous la responsabilité des écoles techniques et des universités, et ce pour autant que les intéressés n'ont pas pu trouver un emploi par leurs propres moyens.
paragraphs.think: The paragraph focuses on young graduates (POP_YOUTH) and their allocation systems. Paragraph 73 discusses measures to support young graduates' career starts, which complements the target's job allocation system. Paragraph 75 mentions regional technical institutions, which aligns with the target's reference to technical schools and universities in job offer listings.
paragraphs.para_en: 55. In countries where young graduates are assigned to regions where their contribution is considered most useful, their preferences, place of origin, family circumstances, etc., must be taken into account; a system that deserves to be generalized is the allocation of young graduates based on job offers, the list of which is drawn up under the responsibility of technical schools and universities, provided that the individuals concerned have not been able to find employment on their own.

paragraphs.para: 56. Parmi les mesures qui peuvent favoriser les débuts dans le métier ou la profession, il convient de signaler : les avances ou prêts d'honneur, qui permettent de faire face aux frais d'installation; le contrôle discret de l'accueil réservé aux jeunes diplômés dans l'entreprise où ils débutent ; l'organisation, dans les contrées où les cadres sont fréquemment formés à l'étranger, d'un système de placement et d'aide à leur retour dans leur pays, etc..
paragraphs.think: The paragraph focuses on measures to support career initiation (e.g., loans, oversight of young graduates, placement systems), which aligns with T_INI (Initial education and training). Related paragraphs discuss technical assistance (74), regional institutions (75), sending specialists abroad (76), and scholarships (79), all of which complement or support the target's themes of career development and training support.
paragraphs.para_en: Among the measures that can facilitate the beginning of a career or profession, mention should be made of: interest-free advances or loans, which help cover start-up expenses; discreet oversight of the reception given to young graduates in the company where they begin work; the organization, in regions where managerial staff are frequently trained abroad, of a placement and support system to assist their return to their country, etc.

paragraphs.para: 57. Il y a lieu d'intensifier, dans le cadre de l'assistance technique, le développement de la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques sous forme d'aide permettant l'ouverture de nouvelles institutions, l'agrandissement des établissements existants, etc.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and INFRA_OTHER (Infrastructure & resources) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes training for technical/scientific executives (T_INI) and infrastructure development through new institutions/expansion (INFRA_OTHER). Related paragraphs 75-79 discuss complementary initiatives: 75 adds regional collaboration for institutions, 76 addresses international training mobility, and 79 focuses on scholarships for education/training, all aligning with the target's themes.
paragraphs.para_en: 57. It is necessary to intensify, within the framework of technical assistance, the development of training for technical and scientific executives in the form of aid enabling the opening of new institutions, the expansion of existing establishments, and so forth.

paragraphs.para: 58. Dans certains cas, plusieurs pays auront tout avantage à mettre en commun leurs moyens pour créer des établissements techniques ou scientifiques régionaux et, éventuellement, des écoles normales techniques régionales.
paragraphs.think: Tags INFRA_OTHER (infrastructure/resources for technical institutions) and T_OTHER (teacher training schools) are directly supported. Relations are complemental as all paragraphs address resource-sharing, training, or infrastructure for technical/scientific education, aligning with the target's focus on regional collaboration.
paragraphs.para_en: In certain cases, several countries would greatly benefit from pooling their resources to create regional technical or scientific institutions and, potentially, regional technical teacher training schools.

paragraphs.para: 59. Même dans le cas des pays les moins favorisés, l'envoi de spécialistes et d'étudiants à l'étranger continue à s'imposer car, si l'effort financier requis peut paraître peu compatible avec les ressources du pays, il est néanmoins indispensable à son développement; en l'occurrence, comme dans l'application de tout autre moyen auquel on peut avoir recours pour former rapidement des cadres techniques et scientifiques, les difficultés de financement peuvent se résoudre partiellement dans le cadre de l'assistance technique.
paragraphs.think: Tags POL_FIN (financing/technical assistance) and POP_POOR (least favored countries) are directly supported by the text. Para 77 complements by addressing equipment needs (technical assistance), para 78 supports by emphasizing expert understanding for training, and para 79 complements by discussing scholarship initiatives for technical/scientific training.
paragraphs.para_en: 59. Even in the case of the least favored countries, the sending of specialists and students abroad remains necessary because, although the required financial effort may seem incompatible with the country’s resources, it is nevertheless essential for its development; in this instance, as with the implementation of any other means that can be used to rapidly train technical and scientific personnel, financing difficulties can be partially resolved within the framework of technical assistance.

paragraphs.para: 60. Il importe d'adopter des moyens spéciaux pour procurer du matériel scientifique moderne aux laboratoires des pays où il fait défaut. — 207 —
paragraphs.think: Tags F_SCI (science/technology focus) and INFRA_LABS (laboratory equipment) are directly supported by the text. Paragraph 78 discusses expert training for scientific personnel (complemental to equipment provision). Paragraph 79 addresses educational scholarships for technical/scientific training (complemental to laboratory resource development). Both related paragraphs address different aspects of scientific capacity-building.
paragraphs.para_en: 60. It is important to adopt special measures to provide modern scientific equipment to laboratories in countries where it is lacking.

paragraphs.para: 61. Les organisations internationales, régionales ou nationales dont le programme d'activités prévoit l'envoi d'experts en mission se doivent d'accorder une attention particulière aux demandes qui leur sont faites pour obtenir le détachement de spécialistes ou de professeurs en vue de la formation des cadres techniques et scientifiques; il serait indispensable que les experts désignés aient une bonne connaissance des caractères et des besoins du pays auquel ils sont affectés.
